text: A The New York Times analysis verified damage to 22 schools and 17 health facilities in Iran from U.S.-Israeli strikes, though Iran’s Red Crescent says the true toll is far higher: 763 schools and 316 health facilities damaged or destroyed. Many strikes hit dense areas like Tehran, contributing to at least 1,701 civilian deaths, including children and medical workers.
text_zh: 《纽约时报》的一项分析证实，美以袭击在伊朗造成22所学校和17处卫生设施受损，但伊朗红新月会表示，实际损失远不止于此：763所学校和316处卫生设施受损或被毁。许多袭击击中了德黑兰等人口稠密地区，造成至少1701名平民死亡，其中包括儿童和医务人员。

text: This is funny and based Medvedev has been appointed chief editor of Russian high school social studies textbooks, Russia’s education ministry says.

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 IDF announces that two soldiers were injured in southern Lebanon earlier today: Earlier today (Friday), a reservist non-commissioned officer was severely injured, and an additional soldier was lightly injured as a result of shrapnel from an explosive drone that fell near the soldiers in southern Lebanon. The soldiers were evacuated to receive medical treatment in a hospital, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness

text: Iran is reportedly charging ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, according to an Israeli intelligence official. They say the IRGC now effectively controls the strait—deciding which vessels can pass—and may be using the ceasefire period to strengthen its hold on this key route. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 据一位以色列情报官员称，据报道，伊朗正在对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收费。他们表示，伊斯兰革命卫队现在实际上控制了该海峡——决定哪些船只可以通过——并可能利用停火期来加强对这条关键路线的控制。来源：福克斯新闻

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Iran International: Senior Iranian officials are in a deadlock over the composition and authority of the delegation set to negotiate with the U.S. in upcoming talks in Islamabad. Commander of the IRGC Vahidi is attempting to limit the powers of Iranian Parliament speaker Galibaf and Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi in negotiations while pushing for Secretary of the Iranian Supreme National Security Council Zolghadr to be included. Iranian military leadership simultaneously emphasizes that any talks must exclude discussions on Iran’s missile programme. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗国际电视台：伊朗高级官员在即将于伊斯兰堡举行的美伊谈判代表团的组成和权限问题上陷入僵局。伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官瓦希迪正试图限制伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫和伊朗外交部长阿拉格希在谈判中的权力，同时推动将伊朗最高国家安全委员会秘书佐尔加德尔纳入代表团。伊朗军事领导层同时强调，任何会谈都必须排除关于伊朗导弹计划的讨论。@wfwitness

text: Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein (Quincy Institute) Americans still weigh Iran on events that happened 40 years ago - but can’t understand why Iranians might not trust a U.S. president. Trump left the nuclear deal, tried to negotiate again but bombed them. The Trump administration likes to conduct diplomacy while shooting. This isn’t how you conduct diplomacy. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（昆西研究所）：美国人仍然用40年前发生的事情来衡量伊朗——但无法理解为什么伊朗人可能不信任美国总统。特朗普退出了核协议，试图再次谈判但轰炸了他们。特朗普政府喜欢在开枪的同时进行外交。这不是进行外交的方式。完整采访

text: Open Source Intel A senior Iranian security official told Press TV that Israeli strikes on Beirut were halted under Iranian pressure, claiming the pause was made a condition for Israel’s participation in U.S.-led ceasefire talks. text: Open Source Intel Meanwhile, Hezbollah has been firing rockets non stop at northern Israel today, and Launched heavy missiles at southern Israel and Tel Aviv last night. THIS IS A VERY BIG MISTAKE. VERY SIGNIFICANT 🔴 Senior Iranian security official to Press TV: Tehran says it forced Israel to halt strikes in Beirut, making it a condition for joining ceasefire talks with the U.S. Iran claims its delegation’s trip to Islamabad was delayed multiple times over continued attacks, warning the talks could be canceled entirely if strikes resumed. Message from Tehran: any renewed Israeli strikes in Beirut or Dahieh will immediately end negotiations. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：与此同时，真主党今天一直在向以色列北部发射火箭弹，并于昨晚向以色列南部和特拉维夫发射了重型导弹。这是一个非常大的错误。非常严重 🔴 伊朗高级安全官员告诉新闻电视台：德黑兰称其迫使以色列停止了对贝鲁特的袭击，并将其作为加入与美国停火谈判的条件。伊朗声称其代表团前往伊斯兰堡的行程因持续的袭击而被多次推迟，并警告说如果袭击恢复，谈判可能会完全取消。来自德黑兰的信息：任何针对贝鲁特或达希耶的以色列新袭击都将立即结束谈判。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel VERY SIGNIFICANT 🔴 Senior Iranian security official to Press TV: Tehran says it forced Israel to halt strikes in Beirut, making it a condition for joining ceasefire talks with the U.S. Iran claims its delegation’s trip to Islamabad was delayed multiple times over continued attacks, warning the talks could be canceled entirely if strikes resumed. Message from Tehran: any renewed Israeli strikes in Beirut or Dahieh will immediately end negotiations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：非常严重 🔴 伊朗高级安全官员告诉新闻电视台：德黑兰称其迫使以色列停止了对贝鲁特的袭击，并将其作为加入与美国停火谈判的条件。伊朗声称其代表团前往伊斯兰堡的行程因持续的袭击而被多次推迟，并警告说如果袭击恢复，谈判可能会完全取消。来自德黑兰的信息：任何针对贝鲁特或达希耶的以色列新袭击都将立即结束谈判。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @John_ForemanCBE : Former Russian deputy defence minister and a very, very long term ally of Sergei Shoigu who initiated and profited from the military theme park. Pavel Popov, a former Russian deputy defense minister, was sentenced to 19 years in prison for his role in a massive embezzlement case at a military theme park. It's the most prominent of a series of corruption cases against top Defense Ministry officials. /122277 https://twitter.com/Mike_Eckel/status/2042583913625702440/photo/1 - Mike Eckel tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转推 @John_ForemanCBE：前俄罗斯国防部副部长，谢尔盖·绍伊古的长期盟友，他发起并从军事主题公园中获利。前俄罗斯国防部副部长帕维尔·波波夫因在军事主题公园的巨额贪污案中扮演的角色被判处19年监禁。这是针对国防部高级官员的一系列腐败案件中最引人注目的一起。/122277 https://twitter.com/Mike_Eckel/status/2042583913625702440/photo/1 - Mike Eckel 推文

text: Open Source Intel More than 24 hours after Israel issued a fresh evacuation warning for Beirut’s southern suburbs, no strikes have followed, raising uncertainty on the ground. Reports also indicate that U.S. President Donald Trump urged Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to scale back operations in Lebanon to avoid jeopardising fragile ceasefire efforts with Iran. IDF issues urgent evacuation for southern Beirut suburbs as it strikes Hezbollah military targets. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042224135640621241/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：在以色列对贝鲁特南郊发出新的撤离警告超过24小时后，没有发生后续袭击，这增加了地面局势的不确定性。报道还指出，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普敦促总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡缩减在黎巴嫩的行动，以避免危及与伊朗脆弱的停火努力。以色列国防军在袭击真主党军事目标时，对贝鲁特南郊发布了紧急撤离令。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042224135640621241/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Pakistan navy rescued and evacuated crew members of a merchant ship after a distress call in the Arabian Sea. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz：巴基斯坦海军在阿拉伯海收到求救信号后，营救并撤离了一艘商船的船员。推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine's General Staff confirmed strikes on Russian drilling platforms in the Caspian Sea. The hits targeted the LSP-2 ice-resistant platform at the V. Grayfer field and the LSP-1 platform at the Yuri Korchagin field. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042606618022494481/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：乌克兰总参谋部证实袭击了里海的俄罗斯钻井平台。袭击目标是 V. Grayfer 油田的 LSP-2 耐冰平台和 Yuri Korchagin 油田的 LSP-1 平台。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042606618022494481/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV condemns Israel on strikes on Hezbollah in Lebanon: “Absurd and inhuman violence is spreading ferociously through the sacred places of the Christian East, profaned by the blasphemy of war and the brutality of business, with no regard for people’s lives, which are considered at most collateral damage of self-interest. But no gain can be worth the life of the weakest, children, or families. No cause can justify the shedding of innocent blood.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：教皇利奥十四世谴责以色列对黎巴嫩真主党的袭击：“荒谬和不人道的暴力正在基督教东方圣地疯狂蔓延，被战争的亵渎和商业的残酷所玷污，完全不顾人们的生命，这些生命最多被视为自身利益的附带损害。但没有任何收益值得牺牲最弱者、儿童或家庭的生命。没有任何理由可以证明流无辜之血是正当的。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel European, Arab and Gulf states are pressing Israel to halt strikes on Beirut, a Western diplomat told AFP, following deadly attacks earlier in the week. “There is ongoing diplomatic pressure from European states, Gulf states and Egypt on Israel to prevent renewed Israeli airstrikes on Beirut after ‘Black Wednesday’,” the diplomat said. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位西方外交官告诉法新社，继本周早些时候发生致命袭击后，欧洲、阿拉伯和海湾国家正在向以色列施压，要求其停止对贝鲁特的袭击。这位外交官说：“在‘黑色星期三’之后，欧洲国家、海湾国家和埃及正在对以色列进行持续的外交压力，以防止以色列再次对贝鲁特进行空袭。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel MTV: Lebanese forces have surged into Beirut after a government order, with commandos on the ground and sniper teams stationed on rooftops around the presidential palace. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042605795590713672/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：MTV：继政府下令后，黎巴嫩军队已涌入贝鲁特，地面上有突击队，总统府周围的屋顶上部署了狙击小组。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042605795590713672/photo/1 推文
